result:
Here's a summary of all changes made:

## Changes Summary

### Problem
The Controls preferences screen listed all 37 viewer commands in a single flat list under one "Command mapping" category, making it difficult to find specific commands.

### Solution
Grouped commands into 6 logical categories: Answer buttons, Flags, Card / Note, Whiteboard, Navigation, and Other.

### Files Modified

1. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`**
   - Added new `CommandGroup` enum with 6 categories, each with a string resource for its title
   - Added a `group: CommandGroup` parameter to each `ViewerCommand` entry, mapping every command to its category

2. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`**
   - `initSubscreen()` now hides the old single-category placeholder and creates grouped categories
   - `addAllControlPreferencesToCategory()` now iterates over `CommandGroup.values()`, creating a `PreferenceCategory` for each group, then adds the matching commands under it

3. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/Preferences.kt`**
   - Updated search breadcrumbs to use the command's group title instead of the old generic "Command mapping" string

4. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/10-preferences.xml`**
   - Added 6 new string resources for the category group titles

5. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`**
   - Kept the old `PreferenceCategory` placeholder for backward compatibility (hidden at runtime)
   - Updated comment to explain categories are now added programmatically

### File Created

6. **`AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/CommandGroupTest.kt`**
   - Tests that all `ViewerCommand` values belong to a valid `CommandGroup`
   - Tests that all `CommandGroup` values have at least one command
   - Tests that every command is accounted for when grouping

### Command Grouping

| Category | Commands |
|----------|----------|
| Answer buttons | Show Answer, Answer 1-4 |
| Flags | Red, Orange, Green, Blue, Pink, Turquoise, Purple, Remove Flag |
| Card / Note | Edit, Mark, Bury Card/Note, Suspend Card/Note, Delete, Tag, Card Info, Add Note, Reschedule |
| Whiteboard | Toggle, Clear, Change Pen Color |
| Navigation | Exit, Page Up, Page Down, Abort and Sync |
| Other | Undo, Play Media, Record/Replay Voice, Show Hint, Show All Hints |
